314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb442f/4bd7760e/4405acb9/77e3e261/3661877675/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191015_SWMKTossUp_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191015_SWMKTossUp_U1_X1")

name: Team Chabot
subject: Ohio GOP Chair Endorses Rep. Steve Chabot for Reelection
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdilhthl-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdilhthl-kujkulhluu-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**Tuesday, October 15, 2019CONTACT: Jon ConradiPHONE: ‪(513) 202-4023 **_Ohio GOP Chair Endorses Rep. Steve Chabot for Reelection_** _Timken Says "Chabot's Voice in Washington Strengthens the Ohio Republican Party and our State"_CINCINNATI - Ohio Republican Party chairman Jane Timken endorsed Rep. Steve Chabot (R-OH-01) for reelection Tuesday."For nearly 25 years, Congressman Chabot has been reliably fighting for our party and to deliver conservative results for hardworking Ohio families," Timken said. "Congressman Chabot's voice in Washington strengthens the Ohio Republican Party and our state. I am fully committed to supporting Congressman Chabot's successful re-election and I'm proud to endorse his campaign."Chabot thanked Timken for her support and leadership of the state party."Chairman Timken is an incredibly effective leader for our party with the winning record to prove it," Chabot said. "I'm honored and grateful to have her support and endorsement for reelection so I can continue fighting to deliver conservative results for Ohio families."Chabot continues to demonstrate overwhelming support from the Republican Party and fellow conservatives. Last week, Chabot's campaign announced an endorsement from [Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH-04)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdilhthl-kujkulhluu-y/) and the influential conservative organization [Club for Growth Action](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdilhthl-kujkulhluu-j/) backed Chabot's campaign and vowed to "vigorously defend and support him to win and keep his seat." ### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdilhthl-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdilhthl-kujkulhluu-i/)
---|---

name: Cory Booker
subject: Just left the debate stage in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |

| Tonight, I did my best to honor you, friend. I hope you saw that. We're just a few months away from voters starting to weigh in, so every day counts. And tonight, people tuning in for the first time got a look at not only our vision for the future of this country, but what's on the line for all of us in this election. It's not every day that an underdog campaign like ours gets the national spotlight, so it's on us to make the most of this moment. I need your help to keep our campaign on track to reach our $3 million budget goal for October. **[Can you chip in right now to help us build the kind of grassroots campaign it takes to win?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191015_CB_20191015-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for believing in me, Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191015_CB_20191015-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

But the only way we can win -- the only way we can put power back into the hands of working families -- is to build a big, grassroots movement to fight and win in every corner of this country.

clean_body: I'm deeply grateful for everything you do as part of this grassroots team. | | | "" I'm deeply grateful for everything you do as part of this grassroots team. Tonight and every day, from debate stages to town halls to selfie lines, I'm ready to fight my heart out for big, structural change -- because the time for small ideas is over. But the only way we can win -- the only way we can put power back into the hands of working families -- is to build a big, grassroots movement to fight and win in every corner of this country. "" | | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this -- tonight and always. subject: I just stepped off stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I just stepped off the most crowded debate stage in our country's history. I may not have had much time to share my message tonight -- **but I spent every second I had on that stage fighting for you. ** [_**Now, I 'm asking you to fight for me. I'm at risk of being cut from the next debate. But I refuse to let our movement be silenced. Your $5 to qualify for that next stage has never been more important than it is in this critical moment. Can I count on you? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191015_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I left everything I had on that debate stage tonight. I didn't have as much time as I would have liked to share my message with you. But I spent every second I had fighting for you and your family. Now that I could be cut from the next debate -- I need you to fight for me. **I need a massive showing of support in these next 24 hours to make the next debate, show the strength of this movement, and prove that we won 't be silenced. ** If I made you proud tonight, your $5 would mean so much to me in this moment. | | [**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191015_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcff7/3eb3e2fc/53b6c3ca/744c3c77/4120521115/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcff7/3eb3e2fc/53b6c3ca/744c3c76/4120521115/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcff7/3eb3e2fc/53b6c3ca/744c3c75/4120521115/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Staying power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I just stepped off the stage tonight and I am fired up.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk) Hey Yang Gang --

I just stepped off the stage tonight and I am fired up.

The number of Americans tuned in to the overwhelming change that my Humanity First policies can bring to this country is bigger than ever.

**You pushed UBI to the forefront of this debate. You did that. Everything you’re doing is paying off. And I am so proud to be your candidate.**

You also helped us reach our 40,000 contribution goal in time for the debate. Most thought we couldn't do it -- but not me. I knew the Yang Gang could do it.

But now we have to work even harder. Our campaign’s staying power will be measured by what we are able to fundraise in the next 24 hours. So we need you to give it all you can tonight.

**[This is a huge moment for the campaign. Yang Gang, can you donate $10 or more before midnight? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=5&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=7&amount=25&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)
---
We’ve reached a major milestone, but we can’t lose sight of our goal to get to the White House. It’s the only way we can remake this economy that puts Humanity First.

Let’s keep pushing. Let’s show our fellow Americans who can beat Trump in 2020. Let’s let everyone know we’re here to win.

**[Rush $10 or more before midnight and let’s take this fight all the way to the White House.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13670?t=6&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk)**

-Andrew

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1703%2E377263%2EYjL-jk) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Joe Sestak
subject: 33 miles into my walk across New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/ADM_JOE_LOGO.png]

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/sestak-walking-cropped.jpg][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/shoesign_blue%20without%20disclaimer.png]

Yesterday was day 3 of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites. My walk began at 6:15 AM sharp! My company for the day was a Christian Science Monitor reporter.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/EG6av6TX0AI62q7.jpeg]

At 8:00 AM, I spoke with the Dublin School. I told them that it is they who will continue to make our country prosper for generations to come.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/EG66G6yX0AAdwC0.jpeg]

From Dublin I walked onward, as did another woman from Dublin before me. Her name was Granny D, and she walked across the continental United States in protest of Citizens United. When I was in Congress, I brought the first legislation to the floor to combat the effects of Citizens United. From Dublin to Peterborough, I felt was walking in Granny D's shoes.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/EG7GAveWoAEf2sl.jpeg]

Once in Peterborough, I had an interview at the Post & Beam brewing company. This small business is rather remarkable. The building the brewery is in is an old G.A.R. Hall. G.A.R. being an abbreviation for "Grand Army of the Republic." Similar to the VFWs of today, veterans of the Civil War would meet at G.A.R. halls. Being a veteran and the former vice-chair of the small business committee in Congress, I felt a sense of pride being inside that Post & Beam brewery. Or maybe that was the beer :)

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/EG8N95BWoAANTDD.jpeg]

Later that evening, I met with the people of Peterborough and media including the Guardian at the public library. Interestingly, this was the first tax-supported public library in America. We spoke about the proper role of Government in today's society.

Next I drove to Goffstown, then Windham, to speak with local Democrats. We were sure to finish talking in time for the debate. I must say I felt bad for those local Democrats. I heard that the political appetizer was of higher quality than the evening's entreé!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/75695/images/EG9IRjLX0AExWME.jpeg]

I ended the evening by livestreaming my response to last night's presidential debate.

I’m now kicking off day 4, where I’ll be traveling from Peterborough to Mont Vernon. Here’s my schedule for the day:

*
Derry.

name: Tim Walz
subject: My friend, I’m not laughing
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Yesterday, Senate GOP Majority Leader Paul Gazelka published an op-ed in the Star Tribune praising President Trump after his visit to Minnesota last week. His piece desperately tries to rewrite the story of President Trump's failed trade war and the devastating consequences Minnesota farmers have faced because of it, his absurd $1.5 trillion tax giveaway to billionaires and ultra-wealthy corporations, and his relentless efforts to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
Yesterday, Senate GOP Majority Leader Paul Gazelka published an op-ed in the Star Tribune praising President Trump after his visit to Minnesota last week.
His piece desperately tries to rewrite the story of President Trump's failed trade war and the devastating consequences Minnesota farmers have faced because of it, his absurd $1.5 trillion tax giveaway to billionaires and ultra-wealthy corporations, and his relentless efforts to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on.
On top of it all, Majority Leader Gazelka goes to great lengths to downplay President Trump's dangerous rhetoric and erratic decision making as nothing more than "humor" and "bravado."
My friend, I'm not laughing right now. Are you?
**It 's time for Minnesota leaders to acknowledge what we all know to be true: President Trump is trying to spread hate and division because he thinks it will help him win the election next year. **Instead of joining us to condemn it last week when President Trump was in town unleashing his attacks directly on Minnesotans, Majority Leader Gazelka chose to embrace it. And that is deeply disappointing.
This is a perfect example of why it's so important for us to take back the Minnesota Senate next year and elect allies who are prepared to lead with courage and join us in the fight for a brighter vision for our state.
**To stay on track to hit our budget target this month so we can get it done, we need to raise $3,000 by Friday.[Will you make a contribution of $5 or more to help us get there in time?](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Senate Majority Leader Gazelka made sure to note in his op-ed that President Trump "almost won" Minnesota in 2016. And while that's true, let's remember what _actually_ won (and with historic margins) just two years later: Our One Minnesota message that recognizes our strength in unity.
**With your help, I know we will reject the politics of fear and division once again in 2020.[Please, make a contribution that works for you today so we can see it through.](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
****[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-p)****
****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)****
****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)****
****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?refcode=_other-p)****
Thank you for everything.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

| ********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9YkfOOLb3HH6vXQPwHC_oRlIHF3tkzdOw6tjTDMGhc=/8n6thAbB8Dy5NuuU824bIHoSWsrSq0-ovJ9M4p8YmqA=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)********

name: Kevin Lata
subject: Margaret’s email from earlier this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
Hi friend,

I wanted to bump this email from Margaret to the top of your inbox.

As you can see, the tide is clearly turning in FL-16, as our campaign handily outraised our opponent Vern Buchanan during the last quarter. Thanks to you and your incredible support, we're turning this race into one of the top pick up opportunities for Democrats nationwide.

But now is not the time to get overly confident, friend. Our impressive third quarter haul is setting off sirens at Buchanan Headquarters as they recognize the grassroots power behind our campaign -- and the threat we pose to them.

Please see Margaret's email below and rush a donation to our campaign to help us keep up the momentum!

[**http://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VcqKIwoAHooaHm-WTJWiSTO2Qxmm8xLtrdLMBdgZJKY=/91f2DG9BBCFHIzkiN2VU2L7fwvnbs4eHOoocyhpc3-w=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.16_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

-Kevin

\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---
From: **Margaret Good**
Sent: Monday, October 14, 2019 5:05:19 PM
Subject: look what we did
We have some really GOOD news to share...
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VcqKIwoAHooaHm-WTJWiSTO2Qxmm8xLtrdLMBdgZJKY=/2o8x8HSkpEwPxMZLF3wXJ4AnKREG8n87PRPP_zgejgs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.16_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---
Friends,

We have some really GOOD news to share...

Because of your support, in our first quarter in the race, we successfully outraised our long-term incumbent opponent!!

**Together, we are showing that Florida 's 16th district is ready for a new voice and that we are a force to be reckoned with. **

[**We 've got another big goal this week -- our mid-month goal -- and we need to make another big statement that this grassroots network has the energy to take on 12-year incumbent Vern Buchanan and WIN. So, can you help out? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VcqKIwoAHooaHm-WTJWiSTO2Qxmm8xLtrdLMBdgZJKY=/2o8x8HSkpEwPxMZLF3wXJ4AnKREG8n87PRPP_zgejgs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.16_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) | [Donate $10 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VcqKIwoAHooaHm-WTJWiSTO2Qxmm8xLtrdLMBdgZJKY=/2o8x8HSkpEwPxMZLF3wXJ4AnKREG8n87PRPP_zgejgs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.16_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) | [Donate $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VcqKIwoAHooaHm-WTJWiSTO2Qxmm8xLtrdLMBdgZJKY=/2o8x8HSkpEwPxMZLF3wXJ4AnKREG8n87PRPP_zgejgs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.16_b1_kl_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

Our health care system is broken, prescription drug prices are through the roof, and climate change threatens our way of life. We must address these issues in a serious way -- that's why I'm running for Congress.

Our opponent, Congressman Vern Buchanan, has consistently voted against measures that would address these issues, and he has got to go if we want to achieve the results that our country needs.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Democrats Double-Down on the Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

When I began running for Congress, I thought the Green New Deal was a joke.

I could not believe that any politician would support a plan so radical and harmful to the American people, but then I saw the Democratic Primary field embrace these radical ideas.

Of the 12 candidates on the stage last night, 11 of them support the Green New Deal. In fact, Beto O’Rourke has called it the “best proposal I’ve seen” to combat climate change.

Elizabeth Warren has co-sponsored the legislation that will provide “economic security” to those “unwilling to work”. Even Joe Biden called the legislation “crucial framework.”

The Democratic party and its presidential candidates could not be more out of step with the American people.

The Green New Deal would destroy Houston’s economy, kill thousands of jobs in the 7th District and eliminate the healthcare those jobs provide. It would shake the economic foundation that Houston is built on.

Make no mistake, the Democratic party is dead serious about the radical proposals they support. They made that abundantly clear on the stage again last night and throughout this campaign.

This district deserves a Member of Congress who will fight vigorously to defend our values and jobs. It deserves a representative who is not afraid to speak out loudly against policies that target our District.

Congresswoman Fletcher has proven herself unable and unwilling to stand up for our values. If I’m elected your Congressman, you will never have to worry about that again.

Sincerely,
Wesley Parish Hunt
.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=57ab68e359a8432caa4f0766e7de1830&_e=bR-oc1BsHWyE30uDSW04r0_x-6WG4NfJ3140rgub-JE7enbUhZzYwD5WOiU_jh81mOGD_F0R94vHNUOU9MCRycN9a7dn8PfKDuecIrPKAOb_9IW76yFOZUVpFFl1AWqhLFaVcedFpRz2TycqEww_ZuKDd5-ugNObUMXhZZ7zwHGHIFRQr6aQaIryQAnP_WOD0zWzvzMltkDCQAuIMx7gabPGgVrpylF7P7gk-_O86JdE2kVtEzFpMM9gHRlb0srQfG3t3j9grVn8hOGVqyl8wfwf8JnM9tth7EXYcnoyXTM%3D)****

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb442e/4bd7760e/4400446f/77e3e270/2508179119/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_PresLivePoll_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_PresLivePoll_U1_X1")

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: I’m Running for Pennsylvania Auditor General!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
Hi friend,

I think it's time to use the power of the state auditor general's office to deliver **progressive change**. That's why I'm running.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LUo1wQWM8cSvVizLqHQRMs5xQgrL7TrT5qqit7_bx9M=/yBFeAHg5lJ7ceqLXtzlOmxM_ARNn0H9aEwtLwPHHV9E=)

In addition to being the state's fiscal watchdog, as auditor general I will:

✓ Shine a bright light on sexual harassment in government
✓ Take on Big Pharma to lower costs on life saving medicines and end the flow of opioids into our communities
✓ Give lawmakers the data and the resources they need to call out the NRA and finally pass effective gun safety legislation.

And that's just to start!

I think it's ridiculous that there are _no women serving in statewide office in Pennsylvania_ \- and it's been like that for over a decade! In fact, there has never been a progressive woman or a woman of color ever elected statewide.

Let's change that together.

I'm a national board member of the National Organization for Women (NOW), and as a long-time women's rights activist, I led the fights against sexism in the former district attorney and the former sheriff's offices. I've taken on sexual harassment wherever I've seen it and I won't be quiet in Harrisburg.

If we want progressive change in Pennsylvania, then we need a new progressive voice!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LUo1wQWM8cSvVizLqHQRMs5xQgrL7TrT5qqit7_bx9M=/yBFeAHg5lJ7ceqLXtzlOmxM_ARNn0H9aEwtLwPHHV9E=)

**Follow me on social media! **

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LUo1wQWM8cSvVizLqHQRMs5xQgrL7TrT5qqit7_bx9M=/-UfuCsrexfCWilsn8maUqgiVoIDoiK4_C-BUCM94NYg=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LUo1wQWM8cSvVizLqHQRMs5xQgrL7TrT5qqit7_bx9M=/OAHc1ULN3fIbgTq9sdQ065FPNzLILyEeP3av6mUCM0g=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LUo1wQWM8cSvVizLqHQRMs5xQgrL7TrT5qqit7_bx9M=/16SIXNyNJiFR435VCWRycDbQAHFyQQy8Fa97xhM2WCE=?igshid=stndxc9a8pie)

Paid for by Nina for PA
---
Nina for PA
PO Box 40681
Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

1. Follow along on [**Twitter**](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBvGiktsOPCDx52L6LFKIOoJbPtzvKjL2B74rTVRD2-2Bei_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFI-2B40L4rW3eAZZnrWuj0-2FTy4FBEYYGGhfoB9tEVOqF7Y-2B1jnmzFejecEer-2F15SdZeveEUnT9-2Bb4anHLLpjJQBUCaqg-2Fxbokgqkpv86SWGk-2B4FHqy7UF0xoTCvSYGh9V5eOENn-2Fbr8F-2FbY9CpPInOYybt1eXSVVysM-2FNHjr1jdTNJdSG0OQSSa1NhOckzwnkGM-2BZXxZRZxbiGkAT0T96Va8) , [**Facebook**](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBvRozYffHRk0twVeo-2BrpkW9yA4jl53UaXFiIissHZ1IU9B0biC5VerHFqYBYcGjhWA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFI-2B40L4rW3eAZZnrWuj0-2FTIWNDyjDEYwwFkEI9fHfpfDErK6yq-2BVW4pSXGN556dFdfQOHxXQrEGYkaSZNaSh9kkmxpJBfCYVKfrpnBaAhavBO5bpbHmgvUVtn3UDRns9FkvFj7Uit7jqgFPDyifChqVWwPpcONh2HcK-2BqL5gfNWpoy-2BDtHHbv-2FSaItNCQHSNndEB6iuL-2FFpkBlB-2FMTNpwU) , and [**Instagram**](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBsmYkDVXhB9qhp-2F44xEa0YVpp0Xr1rAzZ5rvAvSwoLto_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFI-2B40L4rW3eAZZnrWuj0-2FTVhzuy1BOOG3qqBP7j1YXgqMvbEhC-2B4AAxdpNcbfqsfhud9mHn4RGt3ppmdtP5UHCRPpPL7Zm2RE91VwRJVxY-2BAfR0ZDk-2FrMpq4P-2F1DmvHlwHNZb64eekKWj-2FMIGgi7H-2Fa2a8NqE7ISuwOE6W1iCjLvAe1F-2B6pbe4pCOirgNrTbaxQF-2BIssQcgVSst0Ob7tVO) to stay up-to-date on where Tom is and what he’s doing.

body:
Peter,
I have [**walked 35 miles**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918474/110507978/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619p1) — 1/3 of the way across New Hampshire — with [**65 miles to go**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918475/110507984/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619p2).
Please **mark my progress by[contributing with your financial assistance](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918477/110507990/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619p3):**
[**35 miles completed - $35**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918479/110507995/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619&amount=35)
[**65 miles still to enjoy - $65**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918481/110508000/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619&amount=65)
**I have met the most amazing people.**[_**Please contribute to recognize the time they gave to me**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918482/110508005/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619p4)**to learn about great Americans:**
* **[Kurt](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918484/110508013/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619K) **\- who walked me through how the opioid drug takes control of the “survival” part of your brain, making a desire for it more powerful than even living.
* [**Sam**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918486/110508019/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619S) \- who showed how our very species relies upon entire ecological systems as small as that which revolves around a caterpillar’s existence.
* [**Rick**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918488/110508026/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619R) - who believes those incarcerated must have a second chance in life, beginning from the moment they arrive in his prison and are addressed as “sir”or “ma’am.”
* [**Deb**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918489/110508033/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619D) \- whose relentless care of chronic homeless veterans at her church’s food pantry showed peerless service to others.

**Thank you, for walking in their shoes with me!**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10918491/110508041/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcxNWYyZS0zOGYwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IzuUqBcE2cyUjjT9NC9oLfKJnHsqp80WdC8N5YV1Yc=&refcode=em101619c)
Warmest regards,
Joe

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Can’t be bought & won’t back down!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
** Check out my new ad... I speak directly about what’s at stake & what I stand for. Tap or click here to view >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/56c6134f9d7f9862/36e06b4ac25bc4bac3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter,

I’m writing to let you know about my new campaign ad - and to ask for your help.

Our values are under attack like never before... **and I REFUSE to back down in this fight!**

The way I was raised, before a football game you stood to honor America. And after the game, you knelt to honor God.

Today, in a world of political correctness gone mad, both are considered “controversial”... and many PRAISE people like Colin Kaepernick who kneel for the anthem!

It’s disgraceful... ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!

[**Check out my new ad here, where I lay out exactly what I’ll fight for**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/56c6134f9d7f9862/811a21468da529e0c3d6b838967d376c/33013). [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/56c6134f9d7f9862/1e5b4e88f3ef8aebc3d6b838967d376c/33013) Socialism? Abortion-on-demand? Open borders?

**The far-left agenda is WRONG for Alabama and WRONG for America, period!** This has got to end.

That’s why I got off the sidelines. As your Senator, I’ll have President Trump’s back 100%. We can’t be bought, and we won’t back down.

[**Watch my new ad to see more about where I stand**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/56c6134f9d7f9862/03bb402512c85705c3d6b838967d376c/33013). After you do, please consider making a special contribution to help us share this far and wide. Every $1 we raise will help us reach 12 more voters.

Thank you, Peter!

\- Coach Tuberville [ Watch My New Ad HERE >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/56c6134f9d7f9862/f157e65327dcbf06c3d6b838967d376c/33013) | |

body:

| friend — **There’s a reason the DNC/corporate media didn’t want Tulsi on that debate stage last night. Every time she takes it, she’s the most googled candidate of the night. And that’s because she actually speaks for We, the American people.** Once again, Tulsi proved without a doubt that she is the most fit candidate on that stage to carry out the most important responsibility of the presidency: serving as our country’s Commander in Chief on Day One. We already know that the mainstream media is not going to give Tulsi or our campaign the fair coverage she earned after last night's performance. The Twittersphere DC media elite are already twisting her words, putting a negative spin on her unifying message for the people. **[The biased corporate media is already spinning last night's results so that Tulsi's message is ignored or twisted. name: Cory Booker
subject: Climate change & LGBTQ+ equality & immigrant rights & college affordability & criminal justice reform & affordable housing & the racial wealth gap & voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
We get one shot and only one shot to make sure Donald Trump is a one-term president. | | |
---
| Friend, **We get one shot and only one shot to[make sure Donald Trump is a one-term president.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191016_CB_20191016-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l1_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** That's why I woke up this morning with a feeling that, for voters tuning in for the first time to see what Democrats have to offer, a lot of last night was a missed opportunity for our party. Too much time was spent attacking one another or repeating Republican talking points about our well-intentioned policy differences. We even had a question that echoed Trump's baseless conspiracy theory designed to take down Joe Biden and distract from Trump's own betrayal of his oath. We need to focus on the issues that matter -- issues that got far too little attention last night. The existential threat of climate change, a women's right to reproductive health, and LGBTQ+ equality, which the Supreme Court is debating right now. The humanitarian crisis at our border, and the crippling problem of college affordability. How we'll stop rampant voter suppression efforts going on in states across the country, and how we'll reform our disastrously broken criminal justice system. On how we ensure affordable health care for all Americans and creating an economy that works for all, not just the ones at the top. We win this election by being willing to come together, to say we're the party of lifting every single person up. We win not by just telling voters we're against Trump -- but by **showing people how much better, how much more decent, how much more boldly American we can be.** This election is not a referendum on one guy in one office. It's a question of who we are and who we should be to each other. Hate is the root of Trump's strategy. Love must be the root of ours. That's not only how we win, but how we solve some of the biggest problems we face as a nation. **Today, I need to ask for your help to put our campaign in a position to win this nomination.[Make a donation today -- and help get our campaign on track to meet our ambitious October goals.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191016_CB_20191016-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l2_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Finally, thank you for believing in me and what we can do together. None of us can do this by ourselves. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191016_CB_20191016-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3e/5fca0d19/77796e50/291fe0a4/2426209061/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3e/5fca0d19/77796e50/291fe0a3/2426209061/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3e/5fca0d19/77796e50/291fe0a2/2426209061/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3e/5fca0d19/77796e50/291fe0a1/2426209061/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3e/5fca0d19/77796e50/291fe0a0/2426209061/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3e/5fca0d19/77796e50/291fe0a4/2426209061/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Team Warner
subject: We need 81 more voters from Manassas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Look, the momentum may be on our side but Republicans aren't going down without a fight.
|
---
| | Derek,

Election Day in Virginia is closing in on us! If you've taken action to help Democrats take back the majority in the General Assembly -- by making a donation, knocking on doors, or even reminding your friends to vote -- thank you! **[But do _you_ have a plan to vote yet?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d04e/53d9897e/52600616/1c8ed32b/1615061889/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2vote")**
| **81 voters**
needed in
**Manassas**
to flip VA **blue**! **[**Pledge to Vote**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d04e/53d9897e/52600616/1c8ed32b/1615061889/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2vote")**
---

Look, the momentum may be on our side but Republicans aren't going down without a fight. They're defending their two-seat margin in each chamber with everything they've got. **If we 're going to flip the General Assembly blue, _every single eligible voter_ has to show up at the polls on November 5th.**

Mark has already pledged to vote. **[Will you join him by also pledging to vote right now?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d04e/53d9897e/52600616/1c8ed32b/1615061889/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2vote")**

Once you've made your pledge, ask your friends and family to do the same. Give them a call, send them a text, or just forward this email and let us do the talking!

We're so close to restoring a state legislature that will work for ALL Virginians. But it'll only happen if we all get out to the polls and do our part. **[Pledge to vote right now.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d04e/53d9897e/52600616/1c8ed32b/1615061889/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2vote")**

Thank you,
Team Warner

* CNN is claiming a majority of Americans want impeachment;

With all the fake news and the left's desperation to see President Trump impeached - we need to know if you still stand with him, the Freedom Caucus, and our conservative agenda?** Thank you for responding to this poll as soon as possible so we can have complete data for the Congressman and President Trump. \- Team Meadows | | Paid for by Meadows for Congress This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system December 18, 2018. "Rep. Adam Schiff, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the leftists who are attacking President Trump – and by extension everyone who voted for..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e2761b4254&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Anti-Trump Rep. Schiff’s Secret Impeachment Hearings Are a Witch Hunt in a Fantasyland**

“Rep. Adam Schiff, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and the leftists who are attacking President Trump – and by extension everyone who voted for and supports him – have managed to sink to a new low. On the scale of credibility, they are a minus-10. If they yelled fire, you would stay seated,” Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes for Fox News.

So far, according to Rep. Biggs, Rep. Schiff or members of his staff have:
* Held impeachment hearings behind closed doors

* Met with the “whistleblower” _before_ a complaint was filed

* Not followed the rules of the House of Representatives

* Excluded some members of the House from sitting in on proceedings

* Now said that the whistleblower will not even be called to testify

You can’t make it up: “Schiff excuses his misconduct, claiming Republicans will attempt to manipulate the narrative if his impeachment inquiry hearings were public.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1bbe8cd9b5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Donald J. Trump travels to Texas tomorrow for the opening of a new Louis Vuitton factory, where he will be joined by CEO Bernard Arnault, Rosemary Feitelberg reports for [WWD](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a979622433&e=3ee4985eea). “The plan is to create 1,000 jobs in the next five years at the facility near Keene, Tex.,” which comes as part of the President’s Pledge to America’s Workers.
---
|
---
| “After a championship parade, a Stanley Cup Tour around the world, a ring ceremony, a Hockey Hall of Fame visit and a banner-raising on Opening Night, only one more celebration remained for the Stanley Cup Champion St. Louis Blues, and that was a visit to the White House,” Chris Pinkert writes for [NHL.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6401281754&e=3ee4985eea).

**In 60 seconds** : [Watch President Trump welcome the 2019 Stanley Cup champions!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=18ceb46160&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “For years, unelected bureaucrats have been allowed largely unchecked power over the daily lives of Americans. This president is trying to change that,” Rachel Bovard writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=627b64e2a1&e=3ee4985eea) _._ With new executive action, the Administration is making sure “ordinary Americans have the ability to challenge the government’s determination against them.”
---

subject: LaTurner Maintains Strong Fundraising Lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚩 Thanks to your generous support we came out of the third quarter maintaining our strong fundraising lead over our opponent's campaign. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2656b15e8b8a/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-1354101?e=1050d051da)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

We have great news! Thanks to your generous support we came out of the third quarter maintaining our strong fundraising lead over our opponent's campaign. **Our campaign has received over _$600,000_ in donations since the beginning of the year. ** And here's the best part... more than 85% of that came from right here at home. Thanks to you we are the candidate of choice for Kansans.

We are grateful to all of you for standing with us. We are on a path to victory in 2020, and it is vitally important that we have Jake as the Republican on the ticket, because he is the candidate that can win against the Democrats.

[Would you consider chipping in to make sure we keep our fundraising lead? $500, $250, $100, or even $25 helps.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9d7b6d63f9&e=1050d051da)

Right now the Democrats are working hard to come up with a stronger candidate than [the one that just dropped out](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=71d56a17ee&e=1050d051da), and [with your help we will keep this strong fundraising lead and show the Democrats that Kansas is staying red in 2020!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1a4e724057&e=1050d051da)

Help us keep this forward momentum going by donating [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c2d06c60be&e=1050d051da). Together we can keep the Democrats from scoring another seat in Congress from our state, and instead send a conservative fighter to Washington!

Yours in the fight,
Team LaTurner
---
| [Chip in to Make D.C. Listen](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=eed2e83878&e=1050d051da "Chip in to Make D.C. Listen")

body:
They want Jay out -- that's for sure.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6987?t=3&akid=7969%2E868730%2EdLwmk6) Friend, Wanted to make sure you say Tracy's note yesterday: We're up against a lot here in Washington state -- this race is not in the bag, at all. It's not just a self-funded millionaire we're up against -- fossil fuel money is threatened by our campaign, big time. New research by _The Guardian_ shows that 20 fossil fuel companies are behind a third of all carbon emissions -- and a national voice like Jay's, whose progress in Washington state is influencing national policy in Washington, D.C., is a real threat to their bottom line. [**We have to be prepared for what's coming, and that's why Thursday's deadline really counts: Will you donate $1 or more right now to help us raise $25,000 in grassroots donations?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6987?t=4&akid=7969%2E868730%2EdLwmk6) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6988?t=5&akid=7969%2E868730%2EdLwmk6)

Thanks,
Aisling
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tracy Newman
Date: Tuesday, Oct 15, 2019
Subject: There's a lot at stake right now.
Friend,
We have a big mid-month deadline coming up -- and it really, truly matters. Here's why:
One of Jay's opponents is self-funding his campaign. In fact, he's already put in $500,000 of his own money toward this and says he has another $1.5 million in "personal support." That is a _lot_ of money to jump start his campaign.
**Here's the truth: We depend on real, grassroots donations from folks like you right now, when it counts, to fund the fight to keep our progressive values in play here in Washington. So we're hoping we can count on you right now:**
[**We're trying to raise $25,000 by Thursday to fight back against self-funded millionaires and show that grassroots donors are what truly matters to Jay's campaign. Will you donate $1 or more right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6987?t=11&akid=7969%2E868730%2EdLwmk6)

name: Zachary Meunier
subject: Hi Kim!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | Making sure you saw this message from Kim, Peter. I'm so glad to have her on the team managing our finances as we prepare for a busy winter. **[Can you help us and Kim out and donate $10 today? We're falling behind our goal and we don't want to make her start out on a deficit.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzJR8BrL0ayHbezKVfhZ_BaXc7ljNMmFPYq3giSu4pM=/xnnXO6nwfy3I9aCGWu-r04cHf1RN1QVd60JC-7QBTBE=?refcode=191016-email&recurring=auto&amount=10)** Here's the link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ritahart**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzJR8BrL0ayHbezKVfhZ_BaXc7ljNMmFPYq3giSu4pM=/xnnXO6nwfy3I9aCGWu-r04cHf1RN1QVd60JC-7QBTBE=?refcode=191016-email&recurring=auto;) Yours, Zachary Meunier,
Campaign Manager
Rita for Congress \----- begin forwarded message ----- [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzJR8BrL0ayHbezKVfhZ_BaXc7ljNMmFPYq3giSu4pM=/xnnXO6nwfy3I9aCGWu-r04cHf1RN1QVd60JC-7QBTBE=?refcode=191016-email&recurring=auto) Allow me to introduce myself, Peter. I'm Kim Kaiser, the newest team member of Team Hart! As the Finance Director, it's my responsibility to make sure we keep a positive cash flow. To make a good impression, I'd like to ask a favor. **[We're falling behind on our important October deadline, so can you help me make a good first impression with the team and raise $1,000 by tomorrow?](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzJR8BrL0ayHbezKVfhZ_BaXc7ljNMmFPYq3giSu4pM=/xnnXO6nwfy3I9aCGWu-r04cHf1RN1QVd60JC-7QBTBE=?refcode=191016-email&recurring=auto)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzJR8BrL0ayHbezKVfhZ_BaXc7ljNMmFPYq3giSu4pM=/xnnXO6nwfy3I9aCGWu-r04cHf1RN1QVd60JC-7QBTBE=?refcode=191016-email&recurring=auto) Rita needs to keep up her fundraising in this critical time before our expenditures skyrocket closer to the election, and sustained fundraising is truly the most important part of our campaign right now. **[So, how about it, can you help me get us back on track so I don't start off this position on a bad foot? If everyone reading this gave just $5, we'd be set in no time at all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzJR8BrL0ayHbezKVfhZ_BaXc7ljNMmFPYq3giSu4pM=/xnnXO6nwfy3I9aCGWu-r04cHf1RN1QVd60JC-7QBTBE=?refcode=191016-email&recurring=auto&amount=5)** | [CONTRIBUTE $5 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzJR8BrL0ayHbezKVfhZ_BaXc7ljNMmFPYq3giSu4pM=/xnnXO6nwfy3I9aCGWu-r04cHf1RN1QVd60JC-7QBTBE=?refcode=191016-email&recurring=auto&amount=5)

I look forward to meeting all of you in person! It's such an honor to join Rita's team because I can see just how strongly everyone believes in her, and I'm going to do everything in my power to make sure we can send her to Washington.
Thanks!
Kim Kaiser,
Finance Director
Rita for Congress

_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator, and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District.**_

body:

Elizabeth wrapped up her fourth debate last night, and made us all proud.

She stayed laser-focused on discussing the problems facing this country and our campaign's vision for big, structural change. Because Elizabeth knows that's how we not only beat Donald Trump in November 2020 -- but also how we level the playing field for working families in January 2021.

**But unfortunately, we fell short of our goal of 7,500 new donors on debate night.**

**This movement is powered by grassroots contributions from people like you reading emails just like this one. And if we're going to build the biggest grassroots movement this country has ever seen, we're going to need your help.**

[**Can you help close the gap and make your first donation today? Every contribution -- $3, $5, $28 or whatever you can give -- helps our movement reach new heights all across the country.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285280b9/45c30650/10c7cb94f/66f0dc89/834593613/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzY3Rl9ERUJfU0hPX1RfMjAxOTEwMTZfVjFTMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK67F_DEB_SHO_T_20191016_V1S1") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We outraised Susan Collins this quarter.
body:
This is big.

Friends,
Susan Collins just released her fundraising results from last quarter...and we outraised her.
This is really big for our campaign. Collins outraised us during our first quarter, so _we 're pulling ahead!_
**But that means Collins ' wealthy donors will start pouring even more money into this race to catch up to our grassroots funded campaign. We have to keep pushing: **
[**Make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign today. Help us build on our early momentum so we can defeat Susan Collins next year. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c96/4bef7a87/6b5caa21/287fd608/1494935076/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191016-full")
We proved here that you can't beat grassroots money with big donors. That's incredibly powerful - and important for our campaign since we're rejecting all corporate PAC donations.
Thank you for helping us do that,
\- Team Sara
_\---Original email----_
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c96/4bef7a87/6b5caa21/287fd60f/1494935076/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-launch?refcode=em191016-full")

Friends - I have news.
Our team just finished calculating our fundraising numbers from last quarter. It took us a while because _so many people_ chipped in to support our campaign.
Here are some important numbers from our FEC report:
* **86,438** \- Number of individual contributions since our campaign launch.
* **$27.56** \- Our average online contribution this quarter.
* **0** \- Number of donations from corporate PACs.

Meanwhile, Susan Collins is raising outrageous sums of money from corporate interests and Trump allies. Two former Mitch McConnell staffers even headlined a high-dollar fundraising event for her!
We're proud to be funding our campaign through small-dollar donations, and grateful to supporters like you for helping us do it. BUT it means we have to work extra hard to keep up with Susan Collins. That's why I have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution today to help us keep our incredible momentum going? If we want to win, we have to keep pushing as hard as we can.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c96/4bef7a87/6b5caa21/287fd608/1494935076/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191016-full")
At the end of the day, Susan Collins only has a rolodex of wealthy donors on her side. We have all of you, and that's why we're going to win.
Thank you for being a part of this.
\- Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
**Help us keep our grassroots momentum going by making a $3 contribution today. If we want to win, we have to keep pushing.**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c96/4bef7a87/6b5caa21/287fd608/1494935076/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191016-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c96/4bef7a87/6b5caa21/287fd60e/1494935076/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c96/4bef7a87/6b5caa21/287fd60d/1494935076/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Team Beto
subject: The truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Last night’s debate was a powerful reminder of why Beto’s voice is so
critical in this race.

He spoke candidly about the urgent issues our country faces. Especially
when it comes to gun reform, Beto knows that Americans — most importantly
survivors of gun violence — deserve more than just talking points or
soundbites. They deserve a leader who has the courage to take a stand and
fight for what’s right (not what’s politically easy). That’s why he
couldn't care less about what’s poll-tested or consultant approved — he’s
just going to say what he believes.

Despite the fact that Beto is leading the conversation forward, here’s the
harsh reality our campaign is facing today.

Even though so many people loved what they saw from Beto last night, he
still isn't qualified for the November debate. We’re determined to get him
back on the debate stage next month, but we’re going to need your help to
do it.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38993?refcode=ema20191016-61673&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=61673%2E444211%2E8CX_oH ]So here’s the plan: We need to raise $2 million in the next couple of
weeks to help Beto qualify for the November debate. Will you chip in
$3 or anything you can to help out (every dollar counts)?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38993?refcode=ema20191016-61673&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=61673%2E444211%2E8CX_oH ]Contribute $3

Debates are a critical way for candidates to share their message with an
audience that might not have heard from them before. We can already see
how many new supporters are googling Beto’s story, visiting the website,
and signing up to volunteer for our campaign ever since last night.

The media wants us to think this is a 2-person race –– but we refuse to
let Beto’s voice get drowned out.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38993?refcode=ema20191016-61673&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=61673%2E444211%2E8CX_oH ]Please: If everyone
reading this email gives $3 I know we can get Beto on that
debate stage in November. Will you chip in what you can?

– Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191016footer&t=1022&refcode2=61673_444211_8CX_oH&akid=61673%2E444211%2E8CX_oH

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=61673%2E444211%2E8CX_oH

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: How we're standing up to Trump >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Did you see Trump's rally last week? We need to be ready for whatever Trump and Jason Lewis do to flip Minnesota red. We're $5,221 short of our mid-month goal. Chip in to now to protect Tina and keep

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191016midmonth-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

It's just been six days since Trump's rally in Minneapolis, and one thing remains very clear: He's going to do everything he can to help defeat Tina and turn Minnesota red. **On stage, Trump attacked Tina, smearing her record in the Senate, and then endorsed Tina's extreme right-wing opponent, Jason Lewis.**

We've got to stand up to these attacks.

Trump and Lewis are two of a kind, and they are going to work hand-in-hand in this election, so we need to be ready for whatever they do next. **With everything from reproductive health care to the Supreme Court on the line, we need to come together right now to put everything we've got behind protecting this seat and taking back the Senate.**

**This isn't the end of Trump's attacks -- we need to act now so we can be prepared for any attacks coming from Trump and Lewis. We're halfway through October, and we need $5,221 to hit our mid-month goal.**

**[Pitch in to close our $5,221 gap to protect Tina against the Trump and Jason Lewis alliance and keep Minnesota BLUE.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191016midmonth-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41ad0/c1f7015/670ab261/1145f270/3670825252/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW9jdDIwMTkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkxMDE2bWlkbW9udGgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191016midmonth-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

clean_body: Did you see Trump's rally last week? We need to be ready for whatever Trump and Jason Lewis do to flip Minnesota red. We're $5,221 short of our mid-month goal. Chip in to now to protect Tina and keep | "=" Team, It's just been six days since Trump's rally in Minneapolis, and one thing remains very clear: He's going to do everything he can to help defeat Tina and turn Minnesota red. On stage, Trump attacked Tina, smearing her record in the Senate, and then endorsed Tina's extreme right-wing opponent, Jason Lewis. We've got to stand up to these attacks. Trump and Lewis are two of a kind, and they are going to work hand-in-hand in this election, so we need to be ready for whatever they do next. With everything from reproductive health care to the Supreme Court on the line, we need to come together right now to put everything we've got behind protecting this seat and taking back the Senate. This isn't the end of Trump's attacks -- we need to act now so we can be prepared for any attacks coming from Trump and Lewis. We're halfway through October, and we need $5,221 to hit our mid-month goal. Last night, Elizabeth made it clear that she doesn't just know how to fight -- she knows how to win.

That's how Elizabeth turned the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau from a plan into a reality. That's how she took on a popular Republican senator and won. That's how she took on the big banks and won. And that's what she'll keep doing -- fighting for big, structural change no matter who tries to tell her that it will be too hard.

**To root out the corruption that makes Washington only work for the wealthy and well-connected, to take back our democracy, and to make it easier for working families to get ahead, we need to dream big and fight hard -- but it's only possible if we fight side by side as a grassroots movement.

As Elizabeth said last night, together, we'll outwork, out-organize, and win.**

**[Your support is critical to the success of our campaign. And right now, we need your help to grow our movement and stay on the path to victory. In our latest FEC report, we showed the pundits and skeptics that over 300,000 new donors stepped up to invest in this fight for the first time. It's a sign that our movement is growing, and we need to keep up that momentum in the months to come.

These next days, weeks, and months are some of the most critical of the campaign. It's our last chance to raise what we need to raise before voting and caucusing starts early next year.

The donations coming in right now are immediately invested -- with staff all across the country, targeted ad campaigns, and new digital tools being built to run the campaign we need to not only win the primary, but also to keep the House, flip the Senate, and defeat Donald Trump next November.

**This is how we build a movement. Your donation today will help our campaign fight for every single plan that Elizabeth talked about last night. Your support will power the work that turns those big ideas into reality.**

clean_body: Last night, Elizabeth made it clear that she doesn't just know how to fight -- she knows how to win. | | | "" Last night, Elizabeth made it clear that she doesn't just know how to fight -- she knows how to win. That's how Elizabeth turned the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau from a plan into a reality. That's how she took on a popular Republican senator and won. That's how she took on the big banks and won. And that's what she'll keep doing -- fighting for big, structural change no matter who tries to tell her that it will be too hard. To root out the corruption that makes Washington only work for the wealthy and well-connected, to take back our democracy, and to make it easier for working families to get ahead, we need to dream big and fight hard -- but it's only possible if we fight side by side as a grassroots movement. name: Laura Loomer
subject: The joke is on them!
body:
When I started my run for Congress, the media called me a joke. A local paper, Florida Politics, had this to say about my run, “Whether she’ll raise a dime is a mystery.”
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681827-e0b882692b-e3b0a2fd6a)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a) When I started my run for Congress, the media called me a joke. A local paper, Florida Politics, had this to say about my run, “**Whether she’ll raise a dime is a mystery**.”

But, **the media is now the joke**.

The 3rd Quarter fundraising reports came out yesterday.

And in the 60 days since I announced my candidacy, not only did I out-raise every other Republican running in the primary against me . . . but **I raised more money than career politician and incumbent Democrat Lois Frankel!!**

**Actually, we raised more money than every candidate running for Florida’s 21st Congressional District . . . COMBINED!**
Patriots from ALL 50 STATES stepped up to help me win this race, with most of the donors coming from my state of Florida.

I’ve told you in previous messages that I wanted to shock them when our fundraising numbers were released, **and that’s exactly what we did**.

My campaign out-raised four-term Democrat Lois Frankel, and I’m certain that her phone will be ringing very soon.

On the other end of the line will be the frazzled voice of her best friend, Nancy Pelosi and I can only imagine the conversation (in between the screaming and crying).

But it really doesn’t matter, because Frankel, Pelosi and the entire DCCC, just woke up to this realization: **Laura Loomer is a serious candidate!**

In no uncertain terms, **this race is on!**

And now I’m asking you to [**keep the heat on the Democrats by donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a).

My race to take Florida 21 is THE bellwether race in 2020. If I can flip this district red, then Republicans have a real shot at reclaiming the House and getting Congress back on the path of serving the people, **rather than serving political agendas**.

[**Help me get there today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a)

After outraising every candidate in my race, combined, I’ve made clowns of the liberal media, and proven to any doubters that **I’m in this to win**.

And we’re going to do this together.

[**Are you in?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a)

I’ve written to you several times, asking for your support.

Patriot if I missed your donation, I apologize, but my staff is telling me that you haven’t donated yet.

I hope that by now, you know that not only is my race very real, but it’s winnable!

So, please, take that step now and let’s do this together. [**Donate now.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a)

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a)
This isn’t the first rodeo for my campaign team. They are VERY experienced and as soon as they pulled the reports last night, we jumped on a call to have a serious discussion.

My chief strategist, Karen Giorno, who ran President Donald Trump’s Florida operations in 2016, told me last night, “Laura, after you beat everyone this quarter, it’s on! Pelosi is furious and she’ll be taking the reigns from Frankel to try and stop you. Get the word out to your army of supporters and let them know that this race is real!”

Well you heard her, [**so let’s do this!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a)

We need to raise more funds than every candidate I’m facing, and we have to do it **every single quarter UNTIL WE WIN!**

So please, [**donate as much as you can today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a).

This race represents the fate of our nation. If we can flip this seat, with no exaggeration, every seat held by a Democrat in Congress is vulnerable, so [**let’s prove it together**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I’ll admit, I was shocked when the numbers came in. I knew we would do well against the competition, but I didn’t expect to raise more than a four-term incumbent Democrat! So let’s keep the momentum up, and the pressure on, [**by donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a).

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-350677-814611-4681828-97df278419-e3b0a2fd6a)

## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### The Dartmouth: _Republican presidential candidate Weld Speaks at College_
"Former Massachusetts governor Bill Weld visited campus last Thursday, addressing a group of students, faculty and visitors at a policy event held by the Dartmouth College Republicans in Filene Auditorium." **[You can watch the entire event here.](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGY9ILbv-e_ABNdekFC5DwgMzK_r5sDqsR9ETy5voTc5ZFWVXq6hVMS43940400_F1BjNCln7iFD6vOd_m11VDBRiitDVxGIRuGwKI_PCZHal&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191016_newsletters_s&n=4) **

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=AsR_z4Ya39h-kIzczbN9CeDcvUurd_nYI8tbAi6SYgivRqKCm9Hl0HB59N5S5kBbkg4A0laGX13Ayy5EyuVnx7B0tebeK9sGEb2ASJqPQFBDs7Jf31C6rhiRSdO_sU3j94tzO-pznCb82xmTOmZ7Tw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191016_newsletters_s&n=5)
### Foreign Affairs: _Reclaiming Republican Foreign Policy_
"I am running against Trump for the Republican nomination for president in part to return the United States to the stable, bipartisan foreign policy that brought the United States through the Cold War."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=CAfpnUU8ICsC7-LpWiV2SMDYF1gRt7OPG7ii5XsRhy5ZsVxoWIGSwyMmYXpw3tSpDzaNXd3bpPd_FIs1x1c03774VBX1QKwfH0xkvR8Z177WwKoAe0oAMtzYdRKD1l9u&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191016_newsletters_s&n=6)
### NEW POLLING! Boston Herald
"Former Massachusetts Governor Bill Weld’s support increased from 3 percent in early September to 14 percent today."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=M_ahLUVJ8XpyMWq3jSlm0huJjQ627IzuJGj35Sm-UzLcTOcv_O_GUZG-yDmL-VrX2IelKBnHvgdAgCECVERvYW9MjCWc88I-LAIk0hTtNaTq8KTjABlHX8vDfU8bYM-ndfAUlnktCNJogMiReiTt-rvGD679uC19E0vCBk-5fOw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191016_newsletters_s&n=7)
### NHPR: _2020 Exchange Forum: GOP Presidential Primary Candidate Bill Weld_
"In the first in our series of New Hampshire Primary 2020 Candidate Forums, we sit down before a live audience with Republican presidential contender William Weld to get his views on domestic and foreign policies."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=eFT6NadsmohqmN_ca4T5NJU260k1vUPgnwXu8dECBzvwZ2EQaoNtBbjusuKeTcmTx8s9F_7wFEyqH0WCNkr9sVFLTqS_k9y94GM101jWKZRJkP21CtfYKwW2sIg1zCcg4fdYswrpM7Ponz7uJJ4l1w&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191016_newsletters_s&n=8)
### The Michael Steele Podcast: _Trump's Dog Whistle to the Deranged: With Guest William Weld_
"Weld is fiscally conservative and socially liberal. He ran for Vice President as a Libertarian in 2016, and he says that's the sort of thing that plays well..."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvAoaSin38H2qYWs2Y5qfbyoPjqiga8792BGVbkRJtylIgvAyOAVdtssNC6s_eTkXfYKJ98LAAztlvrh0RUBl1CHSRKYmEi_a94qfsdbLmPOfJxFPXTKVO7Nuu8fWoXk-E&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191016_newsletters_s&n=9)

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4433/4bd7760e/443f09c9/77e39ada/3996351615/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191016_AmyNot4Sale_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191016_AmyNot4Sale_U1_X1")
