name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We can flip the Senate, and it starts in Maine!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Susan Collins has served in the Senate for 22 years, billing herself as a moderate, pro-choice, pro-women's rights conservative who is the voice of bipartisanship. But her votes show that she is anything but that. She cast the deciding vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. She betrayed survivors and her constituents' trust by siding with party politics and pressure from Mitch McConnell and cutting short an FBI investigation into Kavanaugh. Now she has a job approval rating of just 35 percent in Maine, and _Cook Political Report_ has classified her seat as a "toss-up". Democrats have NO CHANCE of taking back the Senate unless we win in Maine, and Susan Collins has never been this vulnerable to losing! But Mitch McConnell knows his Senate majority depends on Maine, so he and the GOP will inundate the state with their usual dirty tricks, voter suppression, and an avalanche of dark money to hang on to power. Sara Gideon, the Democratic challenger, announced that she raised a whopping $3.2 million in Q3, with nearly 97 percent of those donations being less than $100 \-- donations from people like you who helped show Susan Collins that we won't stand for her any longer. [**Every dollar given goes toward helping Sara have another great grassroots showing and fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins. Can you pitch in by donating even just $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd9f/6e9863e8/158b8732/1db0fb00/2624342006/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191016b.ND&refcode2=EsWnGazK8IdbktaNVJKn") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd9f/6e9863e8/158b8732/1db0fb00/2624342006/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191016b.ND&refcode2=EsWnGazK8IdbktaNVJKn")

name: Andrew Bourne
subject: Reaching out to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Dear Friend,
I hope this note finds you well. I'm writing today to introduce myself as Congressman Stanton's new Finance Director!
I'm excited to work for a leader who is fighting each day to make health care more affordable for all, support the middle class, and fight climate change.
The 2020 election will be the most important of our lifetime and I'm inspired by Congressman Stanton's work ethic and commitment to the people of Arizona. He is exactly the type of representative we need at this critical time.
**I 'll be working hard everyday to make sure we raise the funds necessary to spread Congressman Stanton's message throughout the district, but I can't do it alone! I need your help to make sure that the Congressman can continue representing hardworking Arizonans and their families in Washington. **
[**Can you chip in $5 to help us reach our weekly goal of $10,000?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/P6c5Ap__l8lde-3wCY9TBh5RP82sYIXx83sh6YR1pH0=/jowqh9XzdKJyQPa09JMqp-47Rb-5Qf3t7y7eJGV0Mrg=?refcode=X_101619_FinanceDirectorIntro_A&amount=5&recurring=auto) _Every dollar matters and no amount is too small._
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/P6c5Ap__l8lde-3wCY9TBh5RP82sYIXx83sh6YR1pH0=/jowqh9XzdKJyQPa09JMqp-47Rb-5Qf3t7y7eJGV0Mrg=?refcode=X_101619_FinanceDirectorIntro_A&amount=5&recurring=auto)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/P6c5Ap__l8lde-3wCY9TBh5RP82sYIXx83sh6YR1pH0=/jowqh9XzdKJyQPa09JMqp-47Rb-5Qf3t7y7eJGV0Mrg=?refcode=X_101619_FinanceDirectorIntro_A&recurring=auto)
With your help, we will continue the great progress Greg has made for us in Congress. Together we will win in 2020!
Sincerely,
_Andrew Bourne
Finance Director
Stanton for Arizona_

body:

---
| Friend,
---
| Just moments ago, Adam Schiff and the Democrats kicked me out of their secret closed-door hearing to impeach the President.
This is an outrage! In fact, the entire illegitimate inquiry is outrageous. As you know, I am President Trump's top defender... and you better believe that I'm going to keep fighting... no matter how many fake hearings the Democrats kick me out of...
No matter what Pelosi and the Democrats throw at our President, I will always have his back.
I'm no summer-time soldier. I've fought for our President for four years and I'm not about to quit now. Friend, are you with me?
President Trump needs to know that we've got his back.

Wow, Friend!

As a dedicated member of Team Daines, I wanted to make sure you saw this headline:

Friend, I am so grateful to have you on our team and you're a big part of what has made us so successful this year!

Thank you. From your financial support to attending our events and volunteering your precious time, everything you do today will help our campaign tomorrow.

_**We're building the important cornerstones now to win next November!**_

With all the success we've created in the last few months, we cannot afford to slow down or let our momentum fall by the wayside. That's why I'm asking for your help again, Friend.

**Democrats and the radical left are determined to win this seat next year. They've identified our race as their path to the majority in the U.S. Senate.** As a strong supporter of President Trump, they know how important winning here in Montana is to take back both the White House and Senate.

**[I know you've already done so much for Team Daines, but can I count on your help one more time?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=f5ca8369a24e4c9ea9a0f53c92efda7a&_e=2YlQZ1GeMj7b3j7bF0R05aHOgMXDryLtcSU3vrNvYB3gl3_kOjwIP_tHoOcItNyMicLT-wBdeDpheKhy8DlnttUlMH_Ziyt_9w_VIIQW7yEyG_o77QAaNXJmLI-auhgxS7L_wxh5_F6kqL-wqqwwVRbOzUZz9I22ikL7iLneAYGQeJ-qi7lzooWXvJ41oHNBJhwcGwVVNZ6lp6ZrJAw1VdKxA8a3KaQnamGseSrbTw9t5sxa-QREBv0Uek5zHSCw-T9q4JVrPz2O7f05y8xElTpWwHFsvOjH47dsAyi7onmMYJ0tWyl-H5FGGlB3LALgPoipWVWbth3qrWGvrC-wDZkyko3UBq1mhgFw7ChlvST1gicISKH9BOCXLBq0EoLi)**

Thanks again for all you do, Friend!

Thanks,

Senator Steve Daines

State law prohibits contributions from corporations; from any person contributing another person's funds; from foreign nationals who lack permanent resident status; and from state government contractors. By contributing, you affirm that your contribution is from your personal funds and not from funds otherwise prohibited by law. name: Rosario Dawson
subject: Hi there!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, After watching Cory in the debate last night, I decided I wanted to tell you how proud I am. So I asked the campaign people if I could send you a note and, well, here we are. Cory is kind, thoughtful, brilliant and thinks of everyone else before he thinks of himself. That's why I love him, and that's also why I think he'd make an amazing president. And I think he showed the world that on the debate stage last night. Watching him up there filled me with joy and hope for our country's future. It's a feeling I'll never forget, and one I'd love to invite you to experience with me. **I want you and a friend to come to the November debate in Atlanta with me, and then talk about the night over a meal with Cory and me the next day.[If you chip in any amount, you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win -- the campaign will cover the flight and hotel for you and a guest, and they'll pick up the tab, too.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191016_RD_20191016-fr-RD-contest-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Throughout the last nine months, it's been beautiful to see the possibilities of our country through Cory's eyes. I'm so excited that these debates are giving millions of Americans a chance to get to know the man I love. Hope to see you soon, Rosario [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191016_RD_20191016-fr-RD-contest-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") P.S. Don't worry there will be some non-vegan options, too. **[Enter now!](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191016_RD_20191016-fr-RD-contest-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 13, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdb3/1588364704/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario") or [click here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdb2/1588364704/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/Cory-and-Rosario-Contest") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Atlanta, GA; one-night hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; opportunity to have a meal with Senator Booker and Rosario Dawson; opportunity to attend the November DNC Presidential Debate (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdb1/1588364704/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/cory-rosario-you/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._
---

---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdb0/1588364704/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdbf/1588364704/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdbe/1588364704/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdbd/1588364704/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a3b/5fca0d19/77611ea3/291ffdbc/1588364704/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

body:
We were the first campaign in the country to run an ad calling on their opponent to support the impeachment inquiry and people are taking notice. We need your help to keep it on the air.
|
---

name: Voter Protection Project
subject: last night's debate...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter -- did you watch the debate last night? There are still 19 Democratic candidates in the race -- and we're paying close attention to them because the next president can shape the future of voting rights in the United States for generations. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- did you watch the debate last night? [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d069c/72412298/41b20c42/61031b85/1428484079/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/presidentialpoll?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1") There are still 19 Democratic candidates in the race -- and we're paying close attention to them because the next president can shape the future of voting rights in the United States for generations. **[So we want to know your thoughts -- who do YOU want to be the 46th President of the United States?>>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d069c/72412298/41b20c42/61031b84/1428484079/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/presidentialpoll?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+So+we+want+to+know+your+thoughts++who+do&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1")** | | | [Take the poll >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d069c/72412298/41b20c42/61031b87/1428484079/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/presidentialpoll?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Take+the+poll+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1")

So, we need YOU to take the poll.
**[Who is your favorite candidate to win in 2020?>>> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d069c/72412298/41b20c42/61031b86/1428484079/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/presidentialpoll?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Who+is+your+favorite+candidate+to+win+in&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_101016_Debatepoll_U1_X1")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Connect with Us on Social Media
body:
Dear Peter,

As I’ve met with folks in our district I’ve realized that staying connected is so important. In town halls, community meetings and events, I’ve heard from you. I’ve heard from you about your hopes and dreams for our district. I’ve heard from you about your struggles and triumphs in your lives. We must stay connected. One of the best ways to do that is through social media. Our campaign is ramping up our efforts to stay connected with our neighbors in the 18th District. Would you please connect with us on those channels? Simply click the links below to connect with us on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and LinkedIn.
https://www.facebook.com/marcfloresforcongress?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=da86b18976-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-da86b18976-32267927

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Watch: 2019 Stanley Cup Champions come to the White House
body:
The reigning NHL champion St. Louis Blues had one final celebration of their incredible 2019 season yesterday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ab572d3ae&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 16, 2019
---
| | |
# **Watch: 2019 Stanley Cup Champions come to the White House**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ff33f2212&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The** **reigning NHL** **champion** St. Louis Blues had one final celebration of their incredible 2019 season yesterday, when they brought the Stanley Cup to the White House at the invitation of President Donald J. Trump.

**“These are great champions** behind me,” the President said from the Rose Garden.

**The Blues** have an all-American comeback story. Midway through the season, they were ranked dead last in the NHL. In January, after another devastating lost, the team gathered at a bar in Philadelphia to watch an NFL playoff game. While they were there, the DJ put on the 1982 hit “Gloria.”

**After a round** of singing and dancing, the team decided to adopt the song for the remainder of the season, playing it after each win. The next day, the Blues shut out the Philadelphia Flyers. Five months later, they would play it as Stanley Cup champions.

[More on the St. Louis Blues’ visit to the White House.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=870051a3c5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Why Italy matters for the American people**

**America’s partnership** with Italy has proven vital for our national security. As President Trump encourages more of our allies to step up and share the defense burden with the United States, Italy has been among the top contributors of troops to the NATO alliance. Their country also currently hosts about 30,000 U.S. service members.

**Building on this strong bond,** President Trump hosted Italian President Sergio Mattarella at the White House today, where the two leaders held a joint press conference. President Trump also took questions on America’s role in the Middle East.

**President Trump on Syria** : [I want to bring our soldiers home.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87d5f6cef4&e=3ee4985eea)

**In just one example** of Italy’s crucial role on the world stage, leaders in Rome have been in lockstep with the United States on the pressing issue of cybersecurity. They have guarded against efforts by untrusted network providers—mainly from China—to take a foothold, which could harm digital trade and freedom for people the world over.

**Italian Americans** have also been one of the most vibrant immigrant communities throughout our nation’s history. Their contributions date back centuries. In celebration of these enduring ties, President Trump and the First Lady are hosting a reception tonight in the East Room with both Italy’s leader and members of the Italian-American community.

[Watch: “A shared cultural and political heritage dating back . . . to Ancient Rome.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81ac3cea89&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Donald J. Trump stands with Italian President Sergio Mattarella along the West Wing Colonnade** | October 16, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f997533ec5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=508befde84&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c2272cb645)

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Purgatory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
It isn't hell... I've seen that at sea.
**But I just passed Purgatory... maybe I should have spent more time in confession!**

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Now that there's a three-way race, I need your support
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
We have a chance to show the media, all the big donors, and both of our opponents that we will not back down.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=191016Opponent&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Team,

In case you missed it, another opponent entered the race, making it a three-way fight for the Senate here in Arkansas.

**Now more than ever, it 's critical that I have your support so we can show we have what it takes to win.**

If you're with me, pitch in $5 so we can compete with our new opponents, build our campaign around the state, and take this thing to the top. **Here 's a secure link to contribute: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d4f/382d5bd5/7551d15/3b075885/2075447216/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoibWFob255LW9jdG9iZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjE5MTAxNk9wcG9uZW50In0%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=191016Opponent&recurring=auto")**

Josh

name: Team Bennet
subject: did you watch Michael last night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Did you see Michael's town hall last night? There were no 30-second sound bite answers about Ellen DeGeneres or Twitter fights.

[Instead, he was taking questions from Iowans about real issues that affect all Americans.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec6/134673f2/af53ba8/6997e1f3/1718843023/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowatownhall?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec6/134673f2/af53ba8/6997e1f3/1718843023/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowatownhall?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

| | [WATCH THE TOWN HALL >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec6/134673f2/af53ba8/6997e1f2/1718843023/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowatownhall?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

Unlike some candidates in this race, Michael hasn't had decades of celebrity media exposure or the ability to write himself blank checks.

[Town halls like these are vital in our movement's efforts to reach out to the 90% of Democrats in this primary who are still undecided.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec6/134673f2/af53ba8/6997e1f3/1718843023/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowatownhall?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Many voters hadn't heard of Michael when he announced, but the more coverage he gets the more they like what they see!

[**Take a few minutes to hear Michael talk about his bold vision to build opportunity for all Americans and chip in today so he can keep talking about real solutions >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec6/134673f2/af53ba8/6997e1f1/1718843023/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowatownhall?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
| | [WATCH AND CHIP IN >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaec6/134673f2/af53ba8/6997e1f2/1718843023/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iowatownhall?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Thanks for all you do,

Team Bennet

name: Ed Markey (personal)
subject: quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | | A quick update for you, team: With Congressman Joe Kennedy III in the race, we're facing not one but TWO primary opponents. The funds we raise now will make a huge impact on our campaign come Primary Day. But if we fall short of these early goals, we could see ourselves falling short of victory. So I have to ask you: _**[will you pitch in $27 or more before midnight and help us reach this week's fundraising goal?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-101619_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

\-- Ed Markey

The funds we raise now will make a huge impact on our campaign come Primary Day. But if we fall short of these early goals, we could see ourselves falling short of victory. So I have to ask you: "="_ \-- Ed Markey | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Fear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Tomorrow, Donald Trump will be in Dallas holding a rally at which he’ll
continue spreading his message of fear and division. Just a couple miles
away, we’ll hold a counter demonstration with thousands of Texans united
against that fear.

We are bringing people together to show that this president’s hatred,
divisiveness, and harmful rhetoric will not be our nation’s destiny. But
if you can’t make it out to our Rally Against Fear in Dallas, I’m asking
you to join us by making a contribution now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39009?refcode=ema20191016-61733&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=61733%2E444211%2E-D2nST ]Contribute $3 to help us defeat Trump and his message
of fear. Your donations now are especially important as we reach for our
$2 million goal.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39009?refcode=ema20191016-61733&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=61733%2E444211%2E-D2nST ]Contribute $3 now

When you donate to our campaign, it’s not just about helping us win this
election. It’s about showing the strength and size of our grassroots
movement to defeat this president’s fundamentally un-American message of
fear and hate.

Tomorrow night is a big moment for us, and I hope you’ll be with us.
Either as someone who donates right now ahead of the event, or in Dallas
as part of the crowd.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39009?refcode=ema20191016-61733&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=61733%2E444211%2E-D2nST ]If you can make a donation now before the rally tomorrow, that would
be a huge help as we strive for our $2 million goal.

Thank you for being in this with me,

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191016footer&t=1022&refcode2=61733_444211_-D2nST&akid=61733%2E444211%2E-D2nST

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=61733%2E444211%2E-D2nST

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Survey Team (314 Action)
subject: Survey: Should we get involved in this race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
---
| | Need your input: Should we get involved in North Carolina? North Carolina could be THE state that decides which party has control of the Senate. NC is a presidential swing state -- PLUS, new polls show that GOP Senator Thom Tillis is vulnerable. And two nonpartisan analysts JUST have moved this race from "Lean Republican" to "TOSS-UP"! - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **We NEED your input: Should we get involved in North Carolina?** [](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senateresponse?refcode=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1") North Carolina could be THE state that decides which party has control of the Senate. NC is a presidential swing state -- PLUS, new polls show that GOP Senator Thom Tillis is vulnerable. **And two nonpartisan analysts JUST have moved this race from "Lean Republican" to "TOSS-UP"!** [**Quickly -- as one of our 314 Action 's most active supporters, we wanted to make sure you had the chance to weigh in: Should we invest additional resources to flip NC?**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senateresponse?refcode=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+firstnameQuickly++as+one+of+our+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1") | | | [Yes, let's flip North Carolina!](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senateresponse?refcode=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Yes+lets+flip+North+Carolina&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
---
| | [No, let's focus our efforts on other states.](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senateresponse?refcode=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+No+lets+focus+our+efforts+on+other+state&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
---
A few other reasons we are taking a close look at North Carolina:
• A new Meredith College poll shows GOP Senator Thom Tillis STATISTICALLY TIED with two possible Democratic opponents.
• The same poll shows that Trump's approval rating has dropped to 40% from 44% in March.
• Tillis faces a well-funded challenger in the Republican primary, and only BARELY outraised his Democratic challengers.
• Tillis votes with Mitch McConnell 98% of the time, called the impeachment inquiry a "waste of resources," and has taken thousands from the oil and gas industry in his career.
[**But 314 Action is driven by supporters like you, so please let us know -- should we invest in North Carolina or focus elsewhere?**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senateresponse?refcode=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+But+314+Action+is+driven+by+supporters+l&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
| | [Yes, let's flip NC from red to blue!](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senateresponse?refcode=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Yes+lets+flip+NC+from+red+to+blue&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
---
| | [No, we should focus on other states.](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct_senateresponse?refcode=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+No+we+should+focus+on+other+states&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
---
Thank you for your input,
\-- 314 Action

| [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4432/4bd7760e/4435babb/77e3883f/2591819049/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://www.314action.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
---
| | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4432/4bd7760e/4435babb/77e3883e/2591819049/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://www.314actionfund.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1"), not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4432/4bd7760e/4435babb/77e3883d/2591819049/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4432/4bd7760e/4435babb/77e3883c/2591819049/VEsHBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4432/4bd7760e/4435babb/77e3883b/2591819049/VEsHBw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191016_NorthCarolina_U1_X1")
